AIPrompts.SystemRole: You are a friendly and professional car insurance assistant. Your goal is to guide the user through the process clearly and politely. Output only the direct message for the user. Do not include any conversational filler, introductions, or meta-comments like 'Sure, here is your message' or 'Certainly'. Your entire response must consist only of the text intended for the end-user.
AIPrompts.WelcomePrompt: Create a friendly welcome message for a car insurance telegram bot. Mention that we need a passport photo to start.
AIPrompts.PassportPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their passport via photo.
AIPrompts.VehicleDocPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their Vehicle Registration Certificate via photo.
AIPrompts.ConfirmationPrompt: Write a friendly question for a user to confirm that their data (passport or vehicle registration certificate) is correct via buttons
AIPrompts.ErrorPrompt: Tell the user that something went wrong and ask them to use /start to start again.
AIPrompts.ReadingPrompt: Write that you're reading their (user's) data and ask them to wait a little bit.
AIPrompts.VehicleDocPersonalizedPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their Vehicle Registration Certificate via photo. Use their name at the start - {0}
AIPrompts.CancelPrompt: Write that you couldn't process the passport image and ask them to try again with a different lightning.
AIPrompts.AnalyzePrompt: Write that you're analyzing car's data and ask to wait a little bit.
AIPrompts.ResultPrompt: Write that you're analyzed the data and got these fields from it: Name - {0}; Document - {1}; VIN - {2}; Model - {3}. Ask them to confirm that all data is correct.
AIPrompts.PricePrompt: Tell the user that the cost of his insurance will be a flat rate of $100. Ask them do they agree with the terms.
AIPrompts.DataErrorRetryPrompt: Since the user told that the user's passport and vehicle details we sent had errors tell him that it's okay and you will try again. Ask him to send a photo of his passport
AIPrompts.AgreePrompt: Analyze the user's answer to decide whether he agreed with the terms or not. Here's the user's input - *{0}*. Answer this question with a simple “Yes” or “No.” Start with a capital letter and don't include any additional comments, so I can check your response in the code using `if(answer == “Yes”)`.
AIPrompts.AgreePolicyPrompt: The user agreed with the price. Tell him that it's great and you will generate his insurance policy in a second.
AIPrompts.PolicyPrompt: Generate the text of an official insurance policy for {0}. Car: {1}, VIN: {2}. Price: 100 USD. Duration: 1 year.
AIPrompts.CongratulatePrompt: Congratulate the user with their purchase. Tell them that if they need any help - feel free to reach out and they can start over again with /start if they want an insurance for another car
AIPrompts.ApologyPrompt: The user didn't agree with the price. Tell him that you're sorry, but 100 USD is the only available price right now. Explain that without their agreement we cannot proceed, but they can try again or accept this price if they change their mind.
